episodes.title: STAKEOUT: Bill Gates testifies to House on Epstein
episodes.description:
STAKEOUT: Bill Gates, billionaire co-founder of Microsoft, is expected to appear for a closed-door, transcribed interview as part of the House Oversight Committee’s Jeffrey Epstein probe. 

READ MORE HEADLINES: https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now

episodes.title: James Comer asks DOJ to investigate: Abuse allegations from Epstein assistant
episodes.description:
House Oversight Committee Chairman James Comer (R-KY) asked the Justice Department this week to investigate allegations of sexual abuse raised by a former assistant to Jeffrey Epstein during her interview with the committee last month, according to a letter from Comer and three other Republican lawmakers. 

https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/florida-congressman-calls-for-subpoena-of-acting-ag-todd-blanche-in-epstein-files-probe#
--------------------------------------

episodes.title: Dems Epstein hearing in Palm Beach
episodes.description:
Democrats from the House Oversight Committee hold a field hearing in Palm Beach regarding Jeffrey Epstein. 

READ MORE: https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/florida-crime-news-jeffrey-epstein-treated-survivors-prostitutes-lois-frankel-ahead-of-epstein-hearing-palm-beach-robert-garcia-democrats-house-oversight-committee-survivors-ghislaine-maxwells-crimes-human-rights-activist-redistricting-controversy-trump#

episodes.title: Rep. Ro Khanna and Epstein survivors' family roundtable
episodes.description: Rep. Ro Khanna (CA-17), co-author of the Epstein Files Transparency Act, convenes a roundtable with Sky and Amanda Roberts, family members of Virginia Giuffre, Epstein survivor Sharlene Rochard, and leading advocacy organizations for a discussion on "the realities of trafficking and sexual assault, the failures in current systems, and actions Congress can take to better protect survivors and prevent abuse." READ MORE: https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/doj-inspector-general-reviews-compliance-with-epstein-files-release-law-redaction-privacy-congress#

episodes.title: Melania Trump says she has no relationship with Jeffrey Epstein, Ghislaine Maxwell
episodes.description: First Lady Melania Trump makes a statement at the White House. READ MORE: https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/first-take-it-down-act-conviction-marks-win-for-melania-trump-backed-law-ai-generated-abuse-artificial-intelligence-ai-generated-sexually-explicit-images-photos-videos-online-harassment-digital-online-abuse-technology-victims#

episodes.title: Republicans SLAM Democrats to walking out of Epstein hearing
episodes.description:
The House Oversight Committee has issued a subpoena to Attorney General Pam Bondi, seeking her testimony on the Justice Department’s handling of the Jeffrey Epstein investigation.

Read more: https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/house-oversight-committee-subpoenas-ag-pam-bondi-over-doj-handling-of-epstein-records-jeffrey-epstein-james-comer-democrats-republicans-trump-administration-transparency-act-sex-offender-palm-beach-bill-clinton-hillary-clinto#

episodes.title: 10 MOMENTS you can't miss from Hillary Clinton's EPSTEIN DEPOSITION
episodes.description:
The House Oversight Committee released the full depositions of former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton and former President Bill Clinton centered on the committee’s investigation into the Epstein files on Monday.

Hillary maintained that she had never even met Epstein throughout the deposition.

In her opening statement, Hillary accused the committee of using her and her husband as a distraction from President Donald Trump, who is heavily mentioned in the government documents.

READ MORE: https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/oversight-committee-posts-full-clinton-depositions-on-epstein-files-after-talks

--------------------------------------

episodes.title: DOJ reports 'substantial progress' reviewing Epstein case files
episodes.description:
The Department of Justice said it has made "substantial progress" in reviewing the Jeffrey Epstein case files. 

The agency also said it found widespread duplication, noting that many records were copies rather than new evidence as officials continue to assess the material.

RELATED CONTENT: https://thenationaldesk.com/search?find=Epstein

episodes.title: Bill and Hillary Clintons defy Epstein subpoenas
episodes.description:
Republican-led House Oversight Committee Chairman James Comer announced on Wednesday that he will move forward with contempt of Congress proceedings against former President Bill Clinton after he defied a congressional subpoena for a Jeffrey Epstein deposition.

The committee warned Hillary Clinton that if she doesn't show up for her deposition on Wednesday morning, she will "face the same fate."

“Not a single Democrat showed up today. Not a single Democrat—the ones who have press conferences on the Capitol steps and talk about how they’re trying to get justice for the victims and all that. It just seems like they only care about questioning Republicans," Comer said in remarks. "And we’ve had a former cabinet secretary, [Alex] Acosta, in for a grilling. We had Bill Barr, former attorney general, in for a grilling. But for whatever reason, President Clinton didn’t show up, and the Democrats on the committee don’t seem to have a problem."

Read more: https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/republican-led-house-oversight-committee-chairman-james-comer-moves-to-hold-bill-clinton-in-contempt-over-jeffrey-epstein-deposition-snub-hillary-congressional-subpoena-president-trump#

episodes.title: Comer threatens to hold Clintons in contempt over Epstein investigation appearance
episodes.description:
House Oversight Chair James Comer warns Bill and Hillary Clinton that they must appear for depositions as part of the panel's Jeffrey Epstein investigation and threatens to start contempt proceedings if they do not comply with their subpoenas. He holds a gaggle surrounding the deposition of former President Bill Clinton. 

READ MORE: https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now

episodes.title: Epstein victims' presser ahead of files vote
episodes.description:
Jeffrey Epstein’s survivors gather on Capitol Hill for a press conference to ratchet up the pressure on lawmakers to vote to release the Epstein files. 

READ MORE: https://thenationaldesk.com/news/americas-news-now/massie-and-khanna-lead-bipartisan-push-for-epstein-files-as-house-vote-looms-massie-khanna-florida-jeffrey-epstein-ghislaine-maxwell-grijalva-house-vote-doj-justice-department-president-donald-trump-sex-trafficking-mar-a-lago-sex-offender-capitol-hill
